storyInfo: A hundred years ago, Mangshan Town was destroyed by the awakening of the bestial Sui. But with destruction comes rebirth. With the help of Yi, master of the Garden of Grotesqueries, the newly-born geists helped returning townsfolk rebuild their home. They live together in the new Mangshan Town to this day.

attributes.content: Surrender now!
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: A crack of thunder knocks the girl's blade out of her hands and sends her to the ground.
Dark clouds hover above her head, ready to deliver an even more powerful thunderclap.
I suggest you don't move, unless you wish to be struck by lightning.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Persistent lot, aren't you, Master Lin and Candleholder Zuo?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: A peaceful end, and no harm was done. Do you really need to prosecute me so?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: All the people you dragged into this 'show' of yours...
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: It is no mean feat, summoning a Sui-Xiang with the token of a Feranmut proxy.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Who are you? Where did you learn such forbidden arts?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Is that all you care about?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: The most ancient secret in this land is within reach, Candleholder, and all you want to do is to arrest everyone who tries to understand it?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Objects have masters, but knowledge has none. Who decided that the Sui Regulator, and no one else, is allowed to know?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: How am I supposed to believe that you have no malicious intent, given what you did at Mangshan Town?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You'll come with us, and you'll paint a clear picture of everything you know, and everything you're planning.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: So you want to take me alive. Does that mean there's nothing you can do, should I insist on running?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Obstinate fool...
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: We want you alive, but not necessarily conscious—
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: One moment!
A crack echoes in the sky, but the fire is faster.
The blade of flame cuts through the thunder, and a figure lands in front of the Liberi.
Your Lei Fa is quite impressive for your age.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Your Arts are familiar. Does Bai Dingshan's generation have their own students now?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: These fire Arts...
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: Could you be—Zushi?!
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: (Isn't this the girl who played with Grain Buds in Dahuang?)
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: I... I am Lin Qingyan, student of the Lei Fa school, and of the Tianshi Bureau.
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: This isn't a formal occasion. No need for formalities.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: You too, girl.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: ...Mo Yi of the Shanhaizhong. Greetings, Tianshi.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: (So she's really Shanhaizhong.)
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Why the look of surprise? Go to the scrolls in the deepest sections of your library. You are the ones who are behind in terms of Feranmut research.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: All I see is the Shanhaizhong committing evil deeds of every kind in the name of the Feranmuts.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: What have I to do with those who commit murder, arson, or any other deeds under the Shanhaizhong name? How is it any of my business?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Can you guarantee that everyone who wears that shiny uniform of yours is an upstanding individual?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: You—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: These eccentric ways, this sharp tongue of yours... you're just like your founder.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: I thought the old carpenter didn't have any heirs left, after all these years. Looks like I was wrong.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: The great hunt a thousand years ago contradicted his ideals. He became disillusioned and shied away from society...
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: But some people remember how he wanted to stop the war.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: You talk big. How do you intend to stop this war?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: I simply wanted to see the master of the Garden of Grotesqueries. It was for this reason that I stole the Book of Kung Fu and summoned the Sui-Xiang.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: I guarantee that this war can be stopped, if I'm allowed to enter his garden to find a certain object.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: ...A remnant of the proxy who disappeared.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: You have nerve, if nothing else...
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Round-head!
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: You've been listening long enough. Are you going to welcome your guests or not?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: All the guests present today are very important...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You certainly made my heart skip a beat with your suggestion... Or you would, if I had one...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Enough small talk. This has more to do with you than anyone else. What do you plan on doing?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: I spoke with my master just now... since both you and a Candleholder of the Sui Regulator are here, may I make a proposal...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: May we have our guests assist in the Placation for this year, as it seems fate has intended?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Placation?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: The Sui Regulator checks on the slumbering bestial Sui and reinforces the seal on the Tomb of Sui. This process is called the Placation.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But it has always been the most experienced Candleholders who handle the affair...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: The rogue proxy entered the Tomb of Sui several days ago. There has been no news since. The Sui Regulator is likely vexed about to how to conduct this year's Placation.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: This is a major matter. I must report to—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You really think there's time to make a report?
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: Just go on. If the Grand Tutor asks, tell him I gave the nod.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: U-Understood...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You, girl, you're coming with me.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: You don't get along with that Candleholder kid, and you'll just keep fighting in there. Whatever you're looking for, he can look for it for you.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: As for you, I want to talk to you about that master of yours.
attributes.name: 'Old Tianshi'

attributes.content: ...As you wish.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What should we do?
attributes.name: Lin Qingyan

attributes.content: It's not hard. Just go up along the path once you enter the Garden of Grotesqueries, and pay attention to your surroundings.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Other than that, be careful of collections in the Garden of Grotesqueries... the geists of the master's collection are a far cry from those you saw in the town. You must be careful.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You said go up? But we're already at the top of the mountain, aren't we?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Where is this 'Garden of Grotesqueries' that you speak of?
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: Infinitely far, and infinitely close... when you are on this mountain, you are adjacent to the Garden of Grotesqueries.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Taking you into the Garden of Grotesqueries is easy, but reach its depths requires the touch of fate—may I borrow the weiqi board that you carry with you?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Of course... go ahead.
attributes.name: Yun Qingping

attributes.content: And may I have the tome you are carrying, young lady?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: ...Whatever.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Thank you...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: A passage will now be opened. Go through this passage, and you may enter the forbidden grounds of the Garden of Grotesqueries.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Lines of war, warp and weft, in the order of heaven and earth—
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: The weiqi board and book extend infinitely into the distance from Liang's hands, creating a realm within a realm. Mountains turn to flatland in the blink of an eye, and the group goes through this strange space—
They step out of it to find a door hidden behind a screen.
Welcome to the Garden of Grotesqueries.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Here we are.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: This was a town full of vitality before that disaster, with hundreds of households and flourishing farmland...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Many years have passed, and now all that is left is—
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Come out.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yes, Master Liang.
attributes.name: Mysterious Entity

attributes.content: Are all of you here?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: (Looks left and right)
attributes.name: Mysterious Entity

attributes.content: There are some broken tiles and bricks amidst the ruins. Not much time has passed since they awakened, and they do not yet understand language... should they be brought out?
attributes.name: Strange Entity

attributes.content: Let me explain why I'm here first.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: All of you must leave this place.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: (Whispering to one another)
attributes.name: Strange Entity

attributes.content: Everyone who lived here has either died or departed after that incident at the Tomb of Sui.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You are mundane artifacts that have gained sentience from the incident's aftermath, wandering this place...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Perhaps you've already sensed the presence of a garden above the tomb, which Yi calls the Garden of Grotesqueries.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Neither Yan nor the siblings will tolerate the presence of a geist-infested ruin in the vicinity of the Garden of Grotesqueries.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: We understand.
attributes.name: Mysterious Entity

attributes.content: But where can we go, Master Liang?
attributes.name: Strange Entity

attributes.content: Yi said those of good form or quality can find a home in the garden. The rest must be cleaned up.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You have one month to prepare. All traces of the disaster should be gone by then.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: The east area has been cleaned up.
attributes.name: Mysterious Entity

attributes.content: We'll sow some grass seeds here, then clean up the west area. It used to be a river that flowed through the town, but it'll take some time to clean up the sludge.
attributes.name: Mysterious Entity

attributes.content: Good work.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: We've gathered the geists that meet the requirements, with reference to the book that you brought... they're all here. There aren't many.
attributes.name: Strange Entity

attributes.content: Go and help them, then come with me to the Garden of Grotesqueries afterwards.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: It's busy here.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Indeed.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Where is Yi?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: He went out.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: He found the surroundings of one of the pavilions a little too sparse, and went looking for something to decorate there.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: It seems like you're the only one around, whenever I visit.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: That's why he built me.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: He can be quite communicative... to people and things that he's interested in.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: He would talk three days and nights to a child just to obtain a stone, even if scolded and abused, but he can't stand to be around your kind for even a few minutes.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: That's for the best, I suppose. I couldn't stand his fake hospitality either.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Back on topic. Are things not proceeding a little slow? Seven days have passed, and only a small part of the ruins has been cleared.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Slow?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Clearing the rubble is the easy part. But properly handling hundreds if not thousands of objects touched by geisthood... I'm sure the Sui Regulator knows full well how arduous a task it is.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: There's an easier way, no?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: If my ears didn't deceive me, some Waregeists are following you back to the Garden of Grotesqueries...
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Do you mean that I should take all the geist-touched objects, bricks and tiles, weeds and branches, chairs and tables, cups and plates... back to the Garden of Grotesqueries?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: We don't have the space.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Didn't you say that Yi thought the garden was a little sparse?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Did I?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: The awakening of Sui caused great upheaval in Baizao and the surrounding lands. Your siblings have paid a dear price, even...
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Stop.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yi says that is all in the past. The siblings do not wish to speak of it, especially not with you.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: In any event, the affairs of the Garden of Grotesqueries have always been the affairs of the people.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: It sits atop the tomb, pinning the slumbering one in a dream, pacifying the evil that would threaten Baizao...
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: I think you're mistaken about something.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Oh?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: The Garden of Grotesqueries is first and foremost Yi's garden.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Home to the rare and delightful, the eccentric and the grotesque from all four corners, from ancient times to present, Yi would love to have the sights of the whole world in its boundaries, and would gladly move the entire garden's layout for the sake of one little rock...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: It is not a tool for the Sui Regulator, and certainly not a trash heap for the Tomb of Sui.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: I will deal with the geists near the tomb. The Sui Regulator should not presume to interfere with anything else.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Hasn't the east side been cleaned up? Why is this Waregeist going that way?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Visitor

attributes.content: Someone's coming. Stay out of sight.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: This is it, this is the place...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: At long last...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Oh, sorry, I didn't realize there was somebody here... er, y-you're human, right?
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Nothing you need to worry about.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Well, er... sir? Are you one of the mandarins assigned to watch these hills, judging by your attire?
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: You could say that.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: This place has long been abandoned, the roads broken and overgrown. No civilian has approached it in many years. Who are you?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You might know there was once a town here. I used to live here.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: It was a long time ago.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: A disaster happened many years ago, a terrible event that no one could truly describe. The town was destroyed overnight...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I was a young boy at the time. My whole family was... it was by sheer luck that I survived.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I went to Jiangqi and lived there for many years. This is the first time I've been back.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Jiangqi is a long way from here.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: A very long way.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I spent most of the money that I saved over the years on this journey.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Just to see these... ruins?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: No, I plan to rest for a couple of days, then get about fixing this house and clearing some farmland around here.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I think my journey has come to an end.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I don't understand. You've found a new life in Jiangqi. Why are you obsessed with these broken ruins?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: They may look like ruins to you, broken beams and cracked bricks overgrown with weeds...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: But after all these years, I still remember how I hid my pocket money in a corner of the house, to buy sweets from a passing peddler...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I remember fighting with the neighbor's kid, bringing lunch to our parents in the fields together, going to class at the school on the west side together...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: This is my home, sir, even if it was destroyed.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: As you say, it was destroyed.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You remember the disaster. Aren't you afraid it may strike again?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Catastrophe is everywhere on this land. There is no haven that has never been touched by disaster.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Disaster might interrupt our lives, but we'll come back after it's gone. We'll fix the houses, clean up the fields, again and again... as it always has been, for centuries and more.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: I met others who fled this place before I set out on the journey. They want to come back, just like me. Before long...
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Given enough time, even objects form an attachment to a place, never mind humans.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: But you can't stay here... at least, not for a few days yet.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Huh?
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: There are official restrictions in place for this area right now. Go and stay at a nearby inn and wait for the announcement.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Alright.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Ouch—did I trip over something?
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: It's nothing. I'll see you off.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Come out.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Silence.
I suggest you come out while I'm still asking politely.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: There is rustling in a corner, and a Waregeist in the shape of a bottle emerges from its hiding place after a while.
...It was you.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You were the one who was running around when the Sui Regulator came, weren't you?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: This place has been cleaned up. Why are you hiding here?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Mm...
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: You don't want to be destroyed?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: (Shakes up and down)
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Do you want to come with me to the Garden of Grotesqueries?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: (Shakes left and right)
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: You want to stay here?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: (Shakes up and down)
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: I'm waiting for someone, sir.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Waiting for someone?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: The ones who made me.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: A scholar by the name of Lan Ke and a woman by the name of Bai Jin made me, when this place was still a town. They said I was the first thing they made for their new home.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: When they got married, they put me in the most prominent place in the living room and put a new flower in me every day. Never forget.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: They shaped me and put me in the furnace, then went off to do other things while I was being heated...
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Then the disaster happened, and they never came back.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: I... I've been waiting for them...
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: You're not going anywhere?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: I'm not going anywhere.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Sir...
Please don't be angry at it, sir.
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: The scroll-shaped entity stands before Liang and angles its upper half forward, its bamboo strips turning white at the effort.
Are you... bowing?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Indeed.
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: I learned that one should bow politely when making a request.
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Oh?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: There used to be a school on the west side of town, and I laid on the top layer of the bookshelf.
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: The teacher told the students, 'Manners maketh man.' He said it many times, and I remembered.
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: It didn't mean to disobey your orders, but it has had no other thought in its mind for so many years.
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Could you, perhaps, oblige it?
attributes.name: Scroll-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: The scroll-shaped entity once again bows.
I won't let you hurt it, no matter your answer!
A sword-shaped entity puts itself in front of the bottle-shaped entity and scroll-shaped entity, pointing its head, the tip of the sword, towards Liang. Its blade reflects the sunlight.
It's my... my...
attributes.name: Sword-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Kindred? Friend?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yeah, that.
attributes.name: Sword-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: I have a few questions for you, bottle.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yes, sir.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: When did you start thinking that way?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: ...I don't remember.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Have you ever doubted?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Why should I doubt?
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: That man from Jiangqi came back. So will Lan Ke and Bai Jin.
attributes.name: Bottle-Shaped Entity

attributes.content: Liang stands in silence, as the wind blows through his hollow skull and chest mechanism, causing a soft humming sound.
He looks like he is thinking.
I thought the contamination had caused you to form basic sentience, no more than that.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You wander around this place, your words and actions limited by your attributes as objects...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Little did I imagine that you would develop human-level thoughts and emotions...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Given enough time, even objects form an attachment to a place, never mind humans.
attributes.name: Returned Traveler

attributes.content: Interesting.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You are Waregeists that have lingered after the disaster. Do you remember what the town looked like?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: We do, sir.
attributes.name: Waregeists

attributes.content: Can you restore it?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Waregeists

attributes.content: Are you willing to live together with humans?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: What have you been doing behind my back, Liang?
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: I told you to clean up the ruins, destroy the Waregeists that should be destroyed, and bring back the Waregeists that should be brought back to the Garden of Grotesqueries...
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: But you built a town?
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: You're talking like you don't know.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: I'm your creation. My thoughts are your thoughts. My deeds are your deeds.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Hah. I see, I see.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: Besides, this is the best solution, isn't it?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: There are too many geist-touched objects around the Tomb of Sui. Simply destroying them or throwing them into the garden won't solve the problem.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: People are returning to this town, long after it was turned to ruins...
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Your account of the changes in the geists is interesting.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: But the Sui Regulator must have complained about letting geists live together with people. What did you say to them?
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: I told them we'll keep an eye.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: 'Yi and I, just the two of us, are going to have a hard time watching over all the geists, if all we have is a single garden.'
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: 'What if the geists get out? It would be like what happened to Mangshan Town: The Sui Regulator would take the brunt of it, then Baizao.'
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Haha, good.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: I never have to worry, with you in charge.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: Xiexie.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Anyway, it's a good thing.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: A town in the proximity of the Garden of Grotesqueries will delay those with ill intent, giving us time to welcome our guests.
attributes.name: Yi

attributes.content: Now, clean the garden, and let us welcome our visitors.
attributes.name: Yi
